name: @arcana-ui/core
description: React components for Arcana UI — AI's #1 design system
quickStart: // Theme switching — no JS runtime, just CSS
themeSetup: Set data-theme='light' or data-theme='dark' on <html> element

tokens.naming: Three-tier architecture: primitives (raw values) → semantic (contextual) → component (scoped)
tokens.themeSwitch: Set data-theme attribute on root element: 'brutalist' | 'commerce' | 'corporate' | 'dark' | 'editorial' | 'glass' | 'light' | 'midnight' | 'mono' | 'nature' | 'neon' | 'retro98' | 'startup' | 'terminal'
tokens.customization: Override any CSS custom property in your CSS to customize. All tokens are prefixed with -- (e.g., --color-action-primary)

themes.name: arcana-brutalist
themes.description: Bloomberg Terminal meets Swiss poster — bold red accent, dramatic typography, thick structural borders

themes.name: arcana-commerce
themes.description: Clean product-focused design — warm neutrals with green accent, Shopify-inspired

themes.name: arcana-corporate
themes.description: Conservative navy/slate palette — trustworthy, enterprise-grade, Stripe-inspired

themes.name: arcana-dark
themes.description: Deep slate dark with vibrant indigo accent — focused, rich, Linear-inspired

themes.name: arcana-editorial
themes.description: Elegant serif typography, high contrast — publishing, NYT-inspired

themes.name: arcana-glass
themes.description: Apple iOS glassmorphism — frosted translucent surfaces on gradient, elegant light typography

themes.name: arcana-light
themes.description: Warm stone palette with indigo accent — clean, precise, Notion-inspired

themes.name: arcana-midnight
themes.description: Deep navy with soft gold accents — premium, finance-grade, Bloomberg-inspired

themes.name: arcana-mono
themes.description: Pure black and white — stark typographic minimalism, portfolio/architecture-inspired

themes.name: arcana-nature
themes.description: Earth tones with warm greens — organic, wellness, sustainability-inspired

themes.name: arcana-neon
themes.description: Electric neon on dark — vivid cyan/pink accents, cyberpunk, gaming-inspired

themes.name: arcana-retro98
themes.description: Authentic Windows 98 recreation — pixel-perfect bevels, navy blue title bars, silver surfaces

themes.name: arcana-startup
themes.description: Vibrant purple-to-pink gradient energy — modern SaaS, Vercel/Linear-inspired

themes.name: arcana-terminal
themes.description: Premium terminal emulator — green phosphor on black, monospace everything, Warp/Hyper-inspired

keyTokens.--color-action-primary: Primary brand color for actions (button, link, highlight)
keyTokens.--color-bg-page: Main background surface for page content
keyTokens.--radius-md: Medium border radius (commonly used in components)
keyTokens.--spacing-md: Medium spacing unit (used for padding, margin, gaps)
keyTokens.--font-size-base: Base text size for body copy

loading.description: Whether the button is in a loading state

icon.description: Icon element displayed before the label

iconRight.description: Icon element displayed after the label

fullWidth.description: Whether the button stretches to fill its container

iconOnly.description: @deprecated Use size="icon" instead. Render as an icon-only button (square shape, requires aria-label)

label.description: Label text displayed above the input

error.description: Error message string or boolean error state

helperText.description: Helper text displayed below the input

prefix.description: Element rendered before the input field

suffix.description: Element rendered after the input field

fullWidth.description: Whether the input stretches to fill its container

required.description: Whether the input is required (shows indicator on label)

wrapperClassName.description: Additional className for the outer wrapper containing border and focus ring

label.description: Label text displayed above the textarea

error.description: Error message string or boolean error state

helperText.description: Helper text displayed below the textarea

autoResize.description: Whether the textarea automatically grows to fit content

showCount.description: Whether to display a character count

label.description: Label text displayed above the select

error.description: Error message string or boolean error state

helperText.description: Helper text displayed below the select

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when no option is selected

value.description: Controlled selected value (string for single, string[] for multiple)

onChange.description: Callback fired when the selection changes

clearable.description: Show clear button to reset selection

fullWidth.description: Whether the select stretches to fill its container

label.description: Label text displayed next to the checkbox

description.description: Description text displayed below the label

indeterminate.description: Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state

error.description: Error message string or boolean error state

label.description: Label text displayed next to the radio button

description.description: Description text displayed below the label

name.description: Name attribute shared by all radio inputs in the group

label.description: Label text displayed as the fieldset legend

onChange.description: Callback fired when the selected value changes

options.description: Array of radio options to render

variant.description: Visual variant — "card" renders each option as a selectable card

label.description: Label text displayed next to the toggle

description.description: Description text displayed below the label

checked.description: Whether the toggle is in the on state

onChange.description: Callback fired when the toggle state changes

dot.description: Whether to display a status dot indicator

alt.description: Alt text for the avatar image

name.description: User name for generating initials and background color

max.description: Maximum number of avatars to display before truncating

padding.description: Padding size applied to the card

interactive.description: Whether the card has hover and focus interactions

action.description: Action element rendered on the right side

onClose.description: Callback fired when the modal should close

closeOnOverlayClick.description: Whether clicking the overlay closes the modal

closeOnEsc.description: Whether pressing Escape closes the modal

footer.description: Footer content rendered at the bottom of the modal

onClick.description: Callback fired when the close button is clicked

variant.description: Visual style variant indicating the alert type

onClose.description: Callback fired when the dismiss button is clicked

onChange.description: Callback fired when the active tab changes

defaultValue.description: Default active tab value for uncontrolled mode

type.description: Whether one or multiple items can be open at once

defaultValue.description: Default open item value(s) for uncontrolled mode

onChange.description: Callback fired when the open items change

gap.description: Spacing between children — semantic name, number (maps to token), or raw CSS

wrap.description: Whether children should wrap to the next line

gap.description: Spacing between children — semantic name, number (maps to token), or raw CSS

wrap.description: Whether children should wrap to the next line

columns.description: Number of columns or responsive column object. Default: auto-collapses (1 mobile, 12 desktop).

gap.description: Gap between grid items — semantic name, number, or raw CSS

span.description: Number of columns to span, or responsive span object

prose.description: When true, sets max-width to optimal reading width (65ch). Overrides size.

padding.description: Horizontal edge padding. Responsive by default.

center.description: Centers the container with auto margins

sticky.description: Whether the navbar sticks to the top of the viewport

border.description: Whether to show a bottom border

mobileContent.description: Content for the mobile drawer (rendered in a DrawerNav on mobile)

mobileMenuTitle.description: Title for the mobile drawer header

collapsed.description: Whether the sidebar is collapsed to icon-only mode

icon.description: Icon element displayed before the label

active.description: Whether this item is currently active

href.description: Render as an anchor element instead of button

badge.description: Badge count or text displayed on the right

isInvalid.description: Whether the field has a validation error

open.description: Whether the bottom sheet is visible

onClose.description: Callback fired when the sheet should close

snapPoints.description: Snap points as fractions of viewport height

dismissible.description: Whether the sheet can be dismissed by tapping the overlay

showHandle.description: Whether to show the drag handle bar

activeKey.description: Key of the currently active item

onChange.description: Callback fired when an item is selected

onClose.description: Callback fired when the drawer should close

side.description: Which side the drawer slides in from

title.description: Optional title shown at top of drawer

overlay.description: Whether to show the backdrop overlay

striped.description: Whether to alternate row background colors

size.description: Size variant affecting cell padding density

bordered.description: Whether to show borders between all cells

sortDirection.description: Current sort direction — null means unsorted

onSort.description: Callback fired when the sort button is clicked

maxItems.description: Maximum items to display before truncating with ellipsis

current.description: Whether this is the current (last) page

onPageChange.description: Callback fired when the page changes

siblingCount.description: Number of sibling pages to show on each side of the current page

showEdges.description: Whether to show first/last page buttons

variant.description: Display variant — "default" shows page buttons, "compact" shows "Page X of Y"

border.description: Whether to show a top border

external.description: Whether this links to an external site

media.description: Media element (image, video, or illustration) for split/fullscreen variants

align.description: Text alignment (only applies to centered variant)

overlay.description: Adds a semi-transparent dark overlay for text readability over media

badge.description: Small announcement badge displayed above the headline

subtitle.description: Section description displayed below the title

features.description: Array of feature items to display

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid layout (desktop)

avatar.description: URL of the author's avatar image

price.description: Price amount — displayed as-is if string, or formatted as number

features.description: List of features with included/excluded status

popular.description: Highlights this tier as recommended (badge + elevated styling)

stats.description: Array of stat items to display

logos.description: Array of logo items to display

data.description: Array of data objects to display

sortable.description: Enable column header click to sort

pagination.description: Enable pagination — true for default (10 rows), or provide config

stickyHeader.description: Keep header row fixed when scrolling table body

emptyState.description: Content shown when data array is empty

onSort.description: Callback fired when a column sort changes

onFilter.description: Callback fired when the filter value changes

onSelect.description: Callback fired when row selection changes

onRowClick.description: Callback fired when a row is clicked

trend.description: Trend indicator with direction and percentage

variant.description: Visual variant — "compact" uses smaller spacing and no icon

value.description: Current progress value (0-100 by default, or 0-max)

color.description: Color mapped to semantic status colors

label.description: Accessible label for the progress bar

showValue.description: Display percentage text alongside the bar

indeterminate.description: Indeterminate mode — shows infinite loading animation

trend.description: Trend indicator with direction and percentage

data.description: Array of recent values for the sparkline chart

sparklineColor.description: Custom sparkline color (defaults to trend color)

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files when multiple

onChange.description: Callback fired when files are selected

description.description: Description text (e.g., "PNG, JPG, PDF up to 10MB")

onClose.description: Callback fired when the drawer should close

side.description: Which side the drawer slides in from

size.description: Size preset — sm: 320px, md: 420px, lg: 640px, full: 100%

overlay.description: Whether to show the backdrop overlay

closeOnOverlayClick.description: Close when clicking the overlay backdrop

trigger.description: The trigger element that opens the popover

defaultOpen.description: Default open state for uncontrolled usage

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes

sideOffset.description: Pixel gap between trigger and popover

onClose.description: Callback fired when the palette should close

onSelect.description: Callback fired when an item is selected

onSearch.description: Async search function for dynamic results

placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the search input

emptyState.description: Content shown when no results match

groups.description: Whether to group items by their group property

label.description: Text or element displayed in the middle of the divider

spacing.description: Spacing above and below (or left/right for vertical)

size.description: Spacing size mapped to spacing tokens

ratio.description: Aspect ratio — preset name or numeric width/height ratio

alt.description: Alt text (required for accessibility — use "" for decorative images)

fallback.description: Fallback content shown while loading or on error

objectFit.description: How the image fills its container

loop.description: Wrap around when reaching the end

dismissible.description: Whether the banner can be dismissed

lines.description: Number of text lines to render

animate.description: Whether to animate the pulse effect

color.description: Color variant — "current" inherits parent text color

fallback.description: Fallback UI — ReactNode or render function receiving error and reset

onError.description: Callback fired when an error is caught

price.description: Price as number or object with current/original

rating.description: Star rating with optional review count

onAddToCart.description: Add to cart handler — shows button when provided

onFavorite.description: Favorite handler — shows heart when provided

onRemove.description: Callback fired when the remove button is clicked

onChange.description: Callback fired when the value changes

originalValue.description: Original price before discount (renders struck-through when provided)

value.description: Current rating value (0 to max, supports 0.5 increments)

count.description: Number of reviews to display after stars (e.g., 128 renders "(128)")

interactive.description: Enable interactive clicking and keyboard navigation

onChange.description: Callback when rating changes (interactive mode only)

value.description: Current CSS color value (hex, rgb, rgba)

onChange.description: Called on every change with a hex value (or rgba for semi-transparent)

showEyeDropper.description: Show eyedropper button when supported (default true)

presetColors.description: Optional palette swatches (e.g. current theme colors)

showRecent.description: Track and show recent colors (default true)

placement.description: Placement of popup relative to trigger

onChange.description: Called when a font is selected

label.description: Label text displayed on the trigger

googleFonts.description: Google Fonts to offer (defaults to a curated list of ~31 fonts)

defaultTheme.description: Default theme to use when no stored preference exists and system detection is not used.

storageKey.description: localStorage key for persisting theme preference.

enableTransitions.description: When `true`, add smooth CSS transitions during theme changes.

hooks.name: useMediaQuery
hooks.description: Reactively matches a CSS media query string. SSR-safe: returns `false` when `window` is unavailable.

hooks.name: useBreakpoint
hooks.description: Returns the current active breakpoint and convenience booleans. SSR-safe: defaults to `"lg"` (desktop) when `window` is unavailable. Breakpoint values match the layout token system: - sm: < 640px - md: 640px – 1023px - lg: 1024px – 1279px - xl: 1280px – 1535px - 2xl: >= 1536px

hooks.name: usePrefersReducedMotion
hooks.description: Returns `true` when the user has enabled "Prefer reduced motion" in their OS or browser settings. SSR-safe: returns `false` when `window` is unavailable. Note: CSS-level reduced motion is already handled by the Arcana token system (all `--duration-*` tokens are zeroed out via a `prefers-reduced-motion` media query in arcana.css). This hook is for **JavaScript-driven** animations where CSS transitions don't apply (e.g., number counters, auto-playing carousels).

hooks.name: useHotkey
hooks.description: Hook to listen for keyboard shortcuts. Automatically handles Cmd (Mac) vs Ctrl (Windows/Linux) when modifier includes "meta". Does not fire when user is typing in an input, textarea, or contenteditable.

hooks.name: useFloating
hooks.description: Positions a floating element relative to a trigger, with smart flip and viewport clamping. Zero dependencies — a lightweight alternative to Floating UI / Popper.js.

hooks.name: useClickOutside
hooks.description: Fires a callback when a click (mousedown) occurs outside of the referenced element. SSR-safe: does nothing when `document` is unavailable.

hooks.name: useDrag
hooks.description: Generic drag interaction hook. Handles mousedown/touchstart → document mousemove/touchmove → mouseup/touchend with optional RAF throttling and coordinate normalization.

hooks.name: useUndoRedo
hooks.description: Generic undo/redo history stack. New pushes after an undo clear the forward (redo) history. Stack size is bounded by `maxHistory`.

hooks.name: useTheme
hooks.description: Reads the persisted theme from localStorage. Returns `null` if no preference is stored or if running on the server. / function getStoredTheme(): ThemeId | null { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null; try { const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY); if (stored && THEME_IDS.includes(stored as ThemeId)) { return stored as ThemeId; } } catch { // localStorage may be unavailable (e.g., private browsing) } return null; } /** Persists the theme choice to localStorage, or removes it to follow system. / function storeTheme(theme: ThemeId | null): void { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return; try { if (theme === null) { localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY); } else { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, theme); } } catch { // Silently fail if localStorage is unavailable } } /** Applies the theme to the document root element. / function applyTheme(theme: ThemeId): void { if (typeof document === 'undefined') return; document.documentElement.setAttribute(ATTRIBUTE, theme); } /** SSR-safe subscription to `prefers-color-scheme: dark` media query. / function useSystemPrefersDark(): boolean { const query = '(prefers-color-scheme: dark)'; const subscribe = useCallback((callback: () => void) => { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return () => {}; const mql = window.matchMedia(query); mql.addEventListener('change', callback); return () => mql.removeEventListener('change', callback); }, []); const getSnapshot = useCallback((): boolean => { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return false; return window.matchMedia(query).matches; }, []); const getServerSnapshot = useCallback((): boolean => false, []); return useSyncExternalStore(subscribe, getSnapshot, getServerSnapshot); } /** Manages theme switching with system preference detection, manual override, and localStorage persistence. SSR-safe: defaults to `"light"` when `window` is unavailable.

hooks.name: useThemeContext
hooks.description: Reads the persisted theme from localStorage. / function getStoredTheme(key: string): ThemeId | null { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null; try { const stored = localStorage.getItem(key); if (stored && THEME_IDS.includes(stored as ThemeId)) { return stored as ThemeId; } } catch { // localStorage may be unavailable } return null; } /** Persists the theme choice to localStorage. / function storeTheme(key: string, theme: ThemeId | null): void { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return; try { if (theme === null) { localStorage.removeItem(key); } else { localStorage.setItem(key, theme); } } catch { // Silently fail } } /** Provides theme state to the component tree via React context. Handles system preference detection (`prefers-color-scheme`), manual override, localStorage persistence, and optional CSS transitions during theme changes.
